name: API Breaking Change Flagged
description: Changes to public API endpoints must be formally checked for backward compatibility. Breaking changes must be explicitly approved.
formula: G(EditFile ∧ api_endpoint → P_chain(Verify ∧ (proved ∧ backward_compatible) ∨ (refuted ∧ P UserApproval)))
rationale: Unintentional API breaking changes cause downstream failures. Formal verification of the API contract catches field removals, type changes, and semantic shifts.

examples.passes: Formalize(GET /users response) → Verify(backward compatible: proved) → EditFile(users_api.py)
examples.fails: Removing a required field from the API response without verification or approval
